sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْمَقْلُوبَةُ مِنْ أَشْهَرِ الْأَطْبَاقِ الشَّعْبِيَّةِ فِي بِلَادِ الشَّامِ، وَهِيَ مَعْرُوفَةٌ بِطَرِيقَةِ تَقْدِيمِهَا الْمُمَيَّزَةِ.
sentences.translation: Maqluba se smatra jednim od najpoznatijih narodnih jela u Levantu, a poznata je po svom specifičnom načinu serviranja.
sentences.translationEn: Maqluba is considered one of the most famous folk dishes in the Levant, and it is known for its distinctive presentation method.

sentences.arabic: تَتَكَوَّنُ هَذِهِ الْأُكْلَةُ مِنْ طَبَقَاتٍ مِنَ الْأُرْزِ، وَالْخُضَارِ الْمَقْلِيَّةِ كَالْبَاذِنْجَانِ أَوِ الزَّهْرَةِ، مَعَ اللَّحْمِ الْمُتَبَّلِ جَيِّداً.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se sastoji od slojeva riže i prženog povrća poput patlidžana ili karfiola, uz dobro začinjeno meso.
sentences.translationEn: This dish consists of layers of rice and fried vegetables such as eggplant or cauliflower, along with well-seasoned meat.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الِانْتِهَاءِ مِنْ عَمَلِيَّةِ الطَّهْيِ، يَتِمُّ قَلْبُ الْقِدْرِ بِحَذَرٍ فَوْقَ صِينِيَّةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ، وَمِنْ هُنَا جَاءَ اسْمُهَا.
sentences.translation: Nakon završetka procesa kuhanja, šerpa se pažljivo preokrene na veliku tepsiju, i otuda potiče njeno ime.
sentences.translationEn: After the cooking process is finished, the pot is carefully flipped over a large tray, and this is where its name comes from.

sentences.arabic: غَالِباً مَا يُزَيَّنُ الطَّبَقُ بِالْمُكَسَّرَاتِ الْمُحَمَّصَةِ وَالْبَقْدُونِسِ الطَّازَجِ لِإِضْفَاءِ نَكْهَةٍ فَرِيدَةٍ وَمَظْهَرٍ جَذَّابٍ.
sentences.translation: Jelo se često ukrašava prženim orašastim plodovima i svježim peršunom kako bi se dodao jedinstven ukus i privlačan izgled.
sentences.translationEn: The dish is often garnished with toasted nuts and fresh parsley to add a unique flavor and attractive appearance.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ الْعَائِلَةُ حَوْلَ هَذِهِ الْوَجْبَةِ خَاصَّةً فِي أَيَّامِ الْجُمُعَةِ، مِمَّا يَجْعَلُهَا رَمْزاً لِلِدِّفْءِ الْعَائِلِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Porodica se okuplja oko ovog obroka, posebno petkom, što ga čini simbolom porodične topline.
sentences.translationEn: The family gathers around this meal especially on Fridays, making it a symbol of family warmth.
